sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103617" key="tetrwboli/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρωβολ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n103617.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">receive four obols</tr_>, i. e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be a soldier</tr_> (v. sq. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9010.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0513.tlg001:55" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">55</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
